description: Very damaged and faded letter written by Yefet b. Menashshe to his brother Halfon f. Menashshe (fl. 1100–1138 CE). The address is better preserved than the content of the letter.
tags: Yefet b. Menashshe, Halfon b. Menashshe
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
